Hours Guide · Updated 2026

Wingstop Hours: Opening & Closing Times 2026

Check out Wingstop hours for every day of the week! Find their opening and closing times, including weekends, for your nearest location.

Hours TableFind Near MeOpeningClosingFAQs

Hours may vary by location. Always check with your local Wingstop store or use our tips below before heading out.

When Does Wingstop Open and Close?

If you're craving some delicious wings from Wingstop, it's important to know their hours before heading out. Whether you're planning a lunch, dinner, or late-night snack, knowing Wingstop hours will make sure you don't miss out on your favorite wings. In this guide, we'll break down the Wingstop hours, including their opening hours and closing hours. Let's dive in!

General Operating Hours

Wingstop has regular hours of operation for all of their locations. These hours may vary a bit depending on your location, but here's a general idea of what you can expect at most Wingstop restaurants:

DayOpening HoursClosing Hours
Monday11:00 AM12:00 AM (midnight)
Tuesday11:00 AM12:00 AM (midnight)
Wednesday11:00 AM12:00 AM (midnight)
Thursday11:00 AM12:00 AM (midnight)
FridayLate Night11:00 AM1:00 AM
SaturdayLate Night11:00 AM1:00 AM
Sunday11:00 AM12:00 AM (midnight)

These hours apply to most Wingstop locations, but it's always a good idea to double-check the Wingstop hours near me to confirm the exact times for your local store.

How to Find a Store Near You

To find the hours for Wingstop near you, you have a few simple options:

Google Search

Simply type "Wingstop hours near me" into Google, and it will show you the opening and closing times for your nearest location.

Wingstop Website

Visit the official Wingstop website and use their store locator tool to check hours for your specific location.

Google Maps

Search for "Wingstop" on Google Maps, and it will show you the hours and exact location of the nearest Wingstop.

By using these methods, you'll always know Wingstop's hours today and can plan your visit accordingly.

Store Opening Times

11:00 AMEvery Day

Most Wingstop locations open at 11:00 AM every day. Whether it's a weekday or weekend, you can expect Wingstop to open their doors at this time to serve up their famous wings.

Store Closing Times

Mon – Thu & Sunday

12:00 AM

Midnight closing. Standard hours for most days of the week.

Friday & Saturday

1:00 AM

Extended late-night hours on weekends. Perfect for late-night wing cravings!

Check Hours for Today

Wondering about Wingstop hours today? Whether it's a regular weekday or weekend, Wingstop usually sticks to their regular hours of 11:00 AM to 12:00 AM (midnight). However, it's always a good idea to double-check with your local Wingstop, especially if you plan to visit during special events or holidays.

Common Questions About Hours

1. What time does Wingstop open?

Wingstop usually opens at 11:00 AM every day. This applies to most locations.

2. What time does Wingstop close?

On weekdays and Sundays, Wingstop closes at 12:00 AM. On weekends (Friday and Saturday), they stay open until 1:00 AM.

3. How can I find Wingstop hours near me?

To find Wingstop hours near me, you can use Google Search, visit the Wingstop website, or check Google Maps for your local Wingstop hours.

4. What are Wingstop's hours today?

Wingstop's hours today are typically 11:00 AM to 12:00 AM (midnight), but it's best to check the specific location near you.

Summary of Operating Times

Now you know all about Wingstop hours, from their general opening and closing times to how you can find the hours for Wingstop near me. Whether you're craving wings for lunch, dinner, or a late-night snack, Wingstop's consistent hours make it easy to plan your visit. Always remember to check with your local store for any changes to their hours, especially around holidays or special events.
